Clarity.justification: The generated diagram is a sequence diagram, which is a different type of diagram compared to the architecture diagram in the ground truth. This makes it difficult for non-technical stakeholders to understand the system architecture. The layout and symbols are not aligned with the purpose of an architecture diagram.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram lacks several components present in the ground truth, such as the mobile device and the cloud components. It also does not show the connections between these components as depicted in the ground truth.

Consistency.justification: The generated diagram uses different notations and styles compared to the ground truth. It is a sequence diagram, which does not match the architecture style of the ground truth diagram. The components and their interactions are not consistently represented.
